topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate smart-home actions based on events scheduled in Google Calendar, such as adjusting thermostat settings, turning lights off, or arming security devices when meetings or events start.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Any event starts from Google Calendar THEN Send blink event using blink(1).
